case_title: WINSTON CHIN VS. SEBASTIAN M SARMIENTO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE, "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL / POST OFFICE WILL NOT ALLOW PERSONAL SERVICE ON WORK GROUNDS. LEFT NOTE TO CONTACT OFFICE". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, SEBASTIAN M
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHIN, WINSTON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED APR-11-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, SEBASTIAN M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, WINSTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, SEBASTIAN M $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY CHIN, WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT SARMIENTO, SEBASTIAN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: SAMUEL LAW FILED BY CHIN, WINSTON SARMIENTO, SEBASTIAN M

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-17-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "THE PARTIES AGREED TO SETTLE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1950. DEFENDANT AGREED TO MAKE THE PAYMENT BY 8/17/12", PER JUDGE SAMUEL LAW. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICES. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-07-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.
